title: i am a star subjectively speaking
description: Lyrics from i am a star subjectively speaking
body:
created on december 10, 2018







fuck facts and fuck fiction
cuz fiction fake it to fit in
facts fight and force the fist in
i don't consent
i demand divorced division
do this cuz i know the difference
you know me from the poetry i live in
i am a star, so far, this is an old transmission
i'll be a black hole before i know who gets it
i'm not an asshole but what i'm lookin back fo

when you feel something moving in the music that's me
and i feel you and i feel that an that's we
and i still do when i look back an that's free

i get high in one hit
fly in one flip
don't want die yet
but i might so i live
